title: EY India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: EY India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
EY India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Rajkot. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About EY India:
EY India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EY India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
